one_law: Smart rank every task and plan row: sequential cloud drain head first · then unified P0–P4 · free-tier cost · real-world output · blockers.

priority_stack.label: Founder form picks + nerve cascade
priority_stack.because: Official form batch submit is the only lawful desired-state writer

priority_stack.label: Cloud FORGE revenue lane (full motor)
priority_stack.because: phase_market · competitor evidence → labs rows · buyer-visible product

priority_stack.label: Noetfield freemium cloud bay
priority_stack.because: Phase 0 north star — freemium before paid

priority_stack.label: TrustField sandbox + outreach
priority_stack.because: Steps 6–7 demos/outreach — cloud/API not Mac Worker body

priority_stack.label: Brain / governance meta rows
priority_stack.because: Useful only when tied to cloud federated proof or buyer-visible output

sequential_drain_law.one_rule: cloud_drain_head row wins tie-break over later CLOUD-SEC rows in same workstream
sequential_drain_law.forbidden: smart_pick skipping head to later sa-mkt without founder override

vocabulary_map.unified_P0: Founder form · desired-state writer (not governance P0–P7)
vocabulary_map.unified_P1: Cloud FORGE phase_market drain (maps queue T0–T3 sa-mkt)
vocabulary_map.unified_P4: Brain meta · M111 mac observe · full-stack when no product pair
vocabulary_map.note: Never mix governance P0–P7 with unified P0–P4 in agent replies — say which table

smart_rank_rules: Apply sequential_drain_law head bonus before sorting
Collect open rows from brain-cloud · cloud-drain · full-stack · outbound · ecosystem M111
Classify real-world output type per row (reuse task_plan_validation classifier)
Apply cost_tier_boost from cloud drain cost_tier field
Apply verdict + blocker penalties from live disk
Pair brain meta rows with cloud registry plan when maps_registry exists — boost score
Deprioritize full_stack + M111 during phase_market unless blocker on cloud path
